odeProperty.value: De Ballena a Gallopedro. Optimizando Dockerfiles
De imágenes de gigabytes a kilobytes — esLibre 2019

odeNavStructure.pageName: De Ballena a Gallopedro Optimizando Dockerfiles

odeComponent.htmlView:

odeComponent.htmlView:
• Me llamo Ernesto Serrano
  • Rompiendo cosas desde 1983
  • Desarrollador del Stevie Wonder Simulator para Android
  • DevOps Engineer en OpenExO
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"SP00000006","markdownTextarea":"- Me llamo Ernesto Serrano - Rompiendo cosas desde 1983 - Desarrollador del Stevie Wonder Simulator para Android - DevOps Engineer en OpenExO","markdownTextareaHtml":"

odeComponent.htmlView: • Ejemplo de código en python para desenfocar a Lenna
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"SP00000015","markdownTextarea":"- Ejemplo de código en python para desenfocar a Lenna","markdownTextareaHtml":"
    \n
  • Ejemplo de código en python para desenfocar a Lenna
    • \n
","markdownInfoDurationInput":"","markdownInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración:","markdownInfoParticipantsInput":"","markdownInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupar:","markdownFeedbackInput":"Mostrar comentarios","markdownFeedbackTextarea":"","markdownFeedbackTextareaHtml":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
• !/usr/bin/env python

  • This code blurr the "Lenna.png" image file

  • import os
  • from PIL import Image, ImageFilter

  • Pillow part

  • in_file = "Lenna.png"
  • out_file = "Lenna-blurred.png"
  • original = Image.open(in_file)
  • blurred = original.filter(ImageFilter.BLUR)
  • blurred.save(out_file)
  • print("Original image: %d" % os.stat(in_file).st_size)
  • print("Blurred image: %d" % os.stat(out_file).st_size)
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"SP00000018","markdownTextarea":"- #!/usr/bin/env python - # This code blurr the "Lenna.png" image file - import os - from PIL import Image, ImageFilter - # Pillow part - in_file = "Lenna.png" - out_file = "Lenna-blurred.png" - original = Image.open(in_file) - blurred = original.filter(ImageFilter.BLUR) - blurred.save(out_file) - print("Original image: %d" % os.stat(in_file).st_size) - print("Blurred image: %d" % os.stat(out_file).st_size)","markdownTextareaHtml":"

  • !/usr/bin/env python

  • This code blurr the "Lenna.png" image file

  • import os
  • from PIL import Image, ImageFilter

  • Pillow part

  • in_file = "Lenna.png"
  • out_file = "Lenna-blurred.png"
  • original = Image.open(in_file)
  • blurred = original.filter(ImageFilter.BLUR)
  • blurred.save(out_file)
  • print("Original image: %d" % os.stat(in_file).st_size)
  • print("Blurred image: %d" % os.stat(out_file).st_size)
","markdownInfoDurationInput":"","markdownInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración:","markdownInfoParticipantsInput":"","markdownInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupar:","markdownFeedbackInput":"Mostrar comentarios","markdownFeedbackTextarea":"","markdownFeedbackTextareaHtml":""}

odeComponent.htmlView: • Diferentes formas de dockerizar nuestra aplicación
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"SP00000021","markdownTextarea":"- Diferentes formas de dockerizar nuestra aplicación","markdownTextareaHtml":"
    \n
  • Diferentes formas de dockerizar nuestra aplicación
    • \n
","markdownInfoDurationInput":"","markdownInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración:","markdownInfoParticipantsInput":"","markdownInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupar:","markdownFeedbackInput":"Mostrar comentarios","markdownFeedbackTextarea":"","markdownFeedbackTextareaHtml":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
• FROM debian:stretch AS example
  • COPY . .
  • RUN apt-get update && \
  • apt-get install -y \
  • python3 \
  • python3-pip
  • RUN pip3 install -r requirements.txt
  • RUN python3 test.py
  • Tamaño: 515MB
  • Tiempo: 57s
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"SP00000024","markdownTextarea":"- FROM debian:stretch AS example - COPY . . - RUN apt-get update && \ - apt-get install -y \ - python3 \ - python3-pip - RUN pip3 install -r requirements.txt - RUN python3 test.py - Tamaño: 515MB - Tiempo: 57s","markdownTextareaHtml":"
  • FROM debian:stretch AS example
  • COPY . .
  • RUN apt-get update && \
  • apt-get install -y \
  • python3 \
  • python3-pip
  • RUN pip3 install -r requirements.txt
  • RUN python3 test.py
  • Tamaño: 515MB
  • Tiempo: 57s
","markdownInfoDurationInput":"","markdownInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración:","markdownInfoParticipantsInput":"","markdownInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupar:","markdownFeedbackInput":"Mostrar comentarios","markdownFeedbackTextarea":"","markdownFeedbackTextareaHtml":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
• FROM debian:stretch-slim AS example
  • RUN apt-get update && \
  • apt-get install -y \
  • python3 \
  • python3-pip
  • COPY requirements.txt .
  • RUN pip3 install -r requirements.txt
  • COPY . .
  • RUN python3 test.py
  • Tamaño: 427MB
  • Tiempo: 51s
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"SP00000027","markdownTextarea":"- FROM debian:stretch-slim AS example - RUN apt-get update && \ - apt-get install -y \ - python3 \ - python3-pip - COPY requirements.txt . - RUN pip3 install -r requirements.txt - COPY . . - RUN python3 test.py - Tamaño: 427MB - Tiempo: 51s","markdownTextareaHtml":"
  • FROM debian:stretch-slim AS example
  • RUN apt-get update && \
  • apt-get install -y \
  • python3 \
  • python3-pip
  • COPY requirements.txt .
  • RUN pip3 install -r requirements.txt
  • COPY . .
  • RUN python3 test.py
  • Tamaño: 427MB
  • Tiempo: 51s
","markdownInfoDurationInput":"","markdownInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración:","markdownInfoParticipantsInput":"","markdownInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupar:","markdownFeedbackInput":"Mostrar comentarios","markdownFeedbackTextarea":"","markdownFeedbackTextareaHtml":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
• FROM python:3.6-alpine AS example
  • RUN apk add --no-cache \
  • build-base \
  • zlib-dev \
  • jpeg-dev \
  • libpng-dev
  • COPY requirements.txt .
  • RUN pip3 install -r requirements.txt
  • COPY . .
  • RUN python3 test.py
  • Tamaño: 287MB
  • Tiempo: 40s
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"SP00000030","markdownTextarea":"- FROM python:3.6-alpine AS example - RUN apk add --no-cache \ - build-base \ - zlib-dev \ - jpeg-dev \ - libpng-dev - COPY requirements.txt . - RUN pip3 install -r requirements.txt - COPY . . - RUN python3 test.py - Tamaño: 287MB - Tiempo: 40s","markdownTextareaHtml":"
  • FROM python:3.6-alpine AS example
  • RUN apk add --no-cache \
  • build-base \
  • zlib-dev \
  • jpeg-dev \
  • libpng-dev
  • COPY requirements.txt .
  • RUN pip3 install -r requirements.txt
  • COPY . .
  • RUN python3 test.py
  • Tamaño: 287MB
  • Tiempo: 40s
","markdownInfoDurationInput":"","markdownInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración:","markdownInfoParticipantsInput":"","markdownInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupar:","markdownFeedbackInput":"Mostrar comentarios","markdownFeedbackTextarea":"","markdownFeedbackTextareaHtml":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
• FROM python:3.6-alpine AS example
  • COPY requirements.txt .
  • RUN apk add --no-cache jpeg libpng \
  • && \
  • apk add --no-cache --virtual .build-deps \
  • build-base \
  • zlib-dev \
  • jpeg-dev \
  • libpng-dev \
  • && \
  • pip3 install -r requirements.txt \
  • && \
  • apk del .build-deps --force-broken-world
  • COPY . .
  • RUN python3 test.py
  • Tamaño: 123MB
  • Tiempo: 34s
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"SP00000033","markdownTextarea":"- FROM python:3.6-alpine AS example - COPY requirements.txt . - RUN apk add --no-cache jpeg libpng \ - && \ - apk add --no-cache --virtual .build-deps \ - build-base \ - zlib-dev \ - jpeg-dev \ - libpng-dev \ - && \ - pip3 install -r requirements.txt \ - && \ - apk del .build-deps --force-broken-world - COPY . . - RUN python3 test.py - Tamaño: 123MB - Tiempo: 34s","markdownTextareaHtml":"
  • FROM python:3.6-alpine AS example
  • COPY requirements.txt .
  • RUN apk add --no-cache jpeg libpng \
  • && \
  • apk add --no-cache --virtual .build-deps \
  • build-base \
  • zlib-dev \
  • jpeg-dev \
  • libpng-dev \
  • && \
  • pip3 install -r requirements.txt \
  • && \
  • apk del .build-deps --force-broken-world
  • COPY . .
  • RUN python3 test.py
  • Tamaño: 123MB
  • Tiempo: 34s
","markdownInfoDurationInput":"","markdownInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración:","markdownInfoParticipantsInput":"","markdownInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupar:","markdownFeedbackInput":"Mostrar comentarios","markdownFeedbackTextarea":"","markdownFeedbackTextareaHtml":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
• FROM alpine:3.9 AS example
  • RUN apk add --no-cache \
  • python3 \
  • py3-pillow
  • COPY requirements.txt .
  • RUN pip3 install -r requirements.txt
  • COPY . .
  • RUN python3 test.py
  • Tamaño: 64.9MB
  • Tiempo: 6s
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"SP00000036","markdownTextarea":"- FROM alpine:3.9 AS example - RUN apk add --no-cache \ - python3 \ - py3-pillow - COPY requirements.txt . - RUN pip3 install -r requirements.txt - COPY . . - RUN python3 test.py - Tamaño: 64.9MB - Tiempo: 6s","markdownTextareaHtml":"
  • FROM alpine:3.9 AS example
  • RUN apk add --no-cache \
  • python3 \
  • py3-pillow
  • COPY requirements.txt .
  • RUN pip3 install -r requirements.txt
  • COPY . .
  • RUN python3 test.py
  • Tamaño: 64.9MB
  • Tiempo: 6s
","markdownInfoDurationInput":"","markdownInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración:","markdownInfoParticipantsInput":"","markdownInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupar:","markdownFeedbackInput":"Mostrar comentarios","markdownFeedbackTextarea":"","markdownFeedbackTextareaHtml":""}

odeComponent.htmlView: • Extrae lo importante y descarta el resto
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"SP00000039","markdownTextarea":"- Extrae lo importante y descarta el resto","markdownTextareaHtml":"
    \n
  • Extrae lo importante y descarta el resto
    • \n
","markdownInfoDurationInput":"","markdownInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración:","markdownInfoParticipantsInput":"","markdownInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupar:","markdownFeedbackInput":"Mostrar comentarios","markdownFeedbackTextarea":"","markdownFeedbackTextareaHtml":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
• FROM alpine:3.9 AS example
  • RUN apk add --no-cache python3 py3-pillow
  • COPY requirements.txt .
  • RUN pip3 install -r requirements.txt
  • COPY . .
  • RUN python3 test.py
  • FROM scratch AS result
  • COPY --from=example Lenna-blurred.png .
  • Tamaño: 310kB
  • Tiempo: 26ms
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"SP00000042","markdownTextarea":"- FROM alpine:3.9 AS example - RUN apk add --no-cache python3 py3-pillow - COPY requirements.txt . - RUN pip3 install -r requirements.txt - COPY . . - RUN python3 test.py - FROM scratch AS result - COPY --from=example Lenna-blurred.png . - Tamaño: 310kB - Tiempo: 26ms","markdownTextareaHtml":"
  • FROM alpine:3.9 AS example
  • RUN apk add --no-cache python3 py3-pillow
  • COPY requirements.txt .
  • RUN pip3 install -r requirements.txt
  • COPY . .
  • RUN python3 test.py
  • FROM scratch AS result
  • COPY --from=example Lenna-blurred.png .
  • Tamaño: 310kB
  • Tiempo: 26ms
","markdownInfoDurationInput":"","markdownInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración:","markdownInfoParticipantsInput":"","markdownInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupar:","markdownFeedbackInput":"Mostrar comentarios","markdownFeedbackTextarea":"","markdownFeedbackTextareaHtml":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
• Utiliza Alpine Linux (apk add --no-cache)
  • Concatena para reducir el número de capas (&& )
  • Aprovecha la caché entre capas (COPY requirements.txt)
  • Extrae solo lo importante (COPY --from)
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"SP00000045","markdownTextarea":"- Utiliza Alpine Linux (apk add --no-cache) - Concatena para reducir el número de capas (&& \) - Aprovecha la caché entre capas (COPY requirements.txt) - Extrae solo lo importante (COPY --from)","markdownTextareaHtml":"
  • Utiliza Alpine Linux (apk add --no-cache)
  • Concatena para reducir el número de capas (&& )
  • Aprovecha la caché entre capas (COPY requirements.txt)
  • Extrae solo lo importante (COPY --from)
","markdownInfoDurationInput":"","markdownInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración:","markdownInfoParticipantsInput":"","markdownInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupar:","markdownFeedbackInput":"Mostrar comentarios","markdownFeedbackTextarea":"","markdownFeedbackTextareaHtml":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
• ¿Alguna pregunta?
  • Código disponible en: https://github.com/erseco/dockerfile-optimization-examples
